title: All You That Fear Jehovah’s Name

verses.text: All you that fear Jehovah's name, his glory tell, his praise proclaim; you children of his chosen race, stand now in awe before his face, stand now in awe before his face.
The suff'ring One he has not spurned, who unto him for help has turned; from him he has not hid his face, but answered his request in grace, but answered his request in grace.
O Lord, your goodness makes me raise amid your people songs of praise; before all them that fear you, now I worship you and pay my vow, I worship you and pay my vow.
For all the meek you will provide, they shall be fed and satisfied; all they that seek the Lord shall live and never-ending praises give, and never-ending praises give.
The Lord's unfailing righteousness all generations shall confess; from age to age shall men be taught what wondrous works the Lord has wrought, what wondrous works the Lord has wrought.
